description.from: Deals 243*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 140% of ATK Physical DMG to a random enemy 3times, applies [Grievous Wound] 1 stack, and increases Physical DMG taken by 30% for 4sec.
description.to: Attacks an enemy 3 times, dealing ??? P.DMG and increasing ??? P.DMG the target takes by 25% for 10 sec. Afterward, each hit inflicts 1 stack of [Mortal Wound] that deals ??? P.DMG over 16 sec. [Mortal Wound] can be stacked up to max 5 times.

description.from:
For 5sec, increases all allies’ ATK by 300*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) and Physical Evasion by 150, and grants self [Breath of Death] for 7sec.

[Breath of Death]: Evades all Physical Attacks..
description.to: Increases all allies' ATK and P.Dodge by 250 for 10 sec. Afterward, Roi grants [Specter's Breath] upon self for 10 sec. For the duration of [Specter's Breath], increases own ATK Spd by 250, DMG dealt to enemies by 20%, and evades all P.DMG attacks

description.from:
Moves behind the enemy and deals 799*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+244.5% ATK Physical DMG, then consumes all [Grievous Wound] stacks on the target to deal additional Physical DMG equal to 180.7% ATK per 1 stacks consumed. On Critical Hit, applies Bleed stacks 1 and resets the cooldown of [Slaughter].

Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, and stacks up to 20 times..
description.to: Moves behind an enemy and deals ??? P.DMG. Consumes stacks of [Mortal Wound] from the target adding ??? P.DMG for every 1 stack. Upon a Crit Hit recovers 2 orbs of Mana and resets Cooldown of [Hack].

description.from:
Every 10sec, when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals 96*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))+54.9% ATK Physical DMG 6 times. Each hit has a 65% chance to apply [Grievous Wound] stacks 1.

[Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical Damage over Time every 1sec for 15sec, stacking up to 5 times.
description.to: Increases Crit Chance by 300. If normal attack is landed as a Crit Hit attacks the target 6 times, dealing additional ??? P.DMG and inflicting a stack of [Mortal Wound] with a 50% chance.

light.from: The target is changed to the enemy with the highest ATK.

dark.from: Increases Attack Speed of all allies by 10% for the duration.
dark.to: Auto attack DMG is boosted by 100% for the duration.

light.from: The chance for [Rend] to apply [Fatal Wound] stacks is changed to 100%.

dark.to: Each hit reduces the hit target's Mana by 150.

description.from: [Merciless] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critical Hit.
description.to: [No Mercy] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critial hit.

description.from: [Curtain of Darkness] increases duration by 3 sec and boosts DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%.
description.to: [Curtain of Darkness] For the duration of Skill, recovers own Mana by 150 every sec and increases own DMG dealt against Bosses by {0}%.

description.from: [Hack] increases DMG by {0}% and applies 1 stack of [Bleed] to the target on Crit.
description.to: [Hack] Increases DMG by 50%. Upon a Critical Hit, increases own ATK Spd by {0} for 5 sec.

dark.from: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by 24% and Critical Damage by 48% for 5 sec. This effect can only be triggered once every 5 sec.
dark.to: Upon a Crit Hit, ATK Spd is increased by 300 and Crit DMG is increased by 60% for 5 sec. Does not activate again during activation.

description.from: When using Normal Attacks or [Rend], has a {0}% chance to apply 1 additional stacks of [Fatal Wound] and deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power per [Fatal Wound] stack.
description.to: Each auto attack has a {0}% chance of inflicting 1 stack of [Mortal Wound]. Each stack of [Mortal Wound] deals additional DMG equal to {1}% of ATK.
